themes.title: AI-agent visibility and inventory
themes.question: Which AI agents, skills, MCPs, extensions, automations, and integrations are running?

themes.title: Allowed use, approvals, exceptions, and ownership
themes.question: Who may use which agent, under what scope, with which approval and review cadence?

themes.title: Technical enforcement for agents and tools
themes.question: What prevents unsafe commands, secret reads, unsafe tool calls, and uncontrolled outputs?

themes.title: Technical vulnerability management
themes.question: Are dependency vulnerabilities detected, remediated, accepted, and evidenced?

themes.title: Continuous evidence and audit readiness
themes.question: Can compliance evidence be regenerated, reviewed, retained, and traced to controls?

themes.title: Agent-related incident response
themes.question: What happens after unsafe autonomy, data exposure, extension abuse, or credential exposure?
